header.name: Vincent DESBROSSES
header.description: From ideation to completion, my skillset covers the full lifecycle of a web project. Let's talk about your next project.

footer.title: Interested in working together?
footer.description: I'm deeply passionate about tech and have honed various skills to lead development projects end-to-end. Excited to discuss your upcoming project; reach out to me!

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: A diverse set of strong skills for your projects.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: I've successfully delivered a variety of projects. Here's a snapshot of my recent work.

allaw.name: Allaw
allaw.description: Allaw is a web platform for notaries, lawyers and judicial officers. It centralizes online visibility, office hours, appointment management and study information. Allaw Connect adds an advanced CRM to manage cases, clients, messages, commercial pipeline, internal organization and daily operational tracking through a modern, streamlined interface.

truthify.name: Truthify
truthify.description: Truthify is a critical-analysis platform designed to break down video transcripts and assess the strength of arguments. It identifies facts, errors, fallacies, and flawed reasoning, then produces a clear, structured report. The goal is to provide a reliable tool to understand the quality of discourse, compare perspectives, and enhance analytical thinking.

legalConstat.name: Légal Constat
legalConstat.description: Platform connecting individuals with bailiffs + CRM.

smartflow.name: Smartflow
smartflow.description: SmartFlow is a web application designed to optimize learning using the Leitner method. It lets users create flashcards, follow an automated spaced-repetition level system, and receive smart reminders to strengthen long-term memory. The goal is simple: help students and curious learners study faster, retain knowledge longer, and structure their learning sessions with clarity and efficiency.

decorNature.name: Décor Nature
decorNature.description: Showcase website for a painting and decoration company.

aimoto.name: Aimoto
aimoto.description: Aimoto is a full-stack Bitcoin price forecasting platform combining AI-driven modeling and interactive web visualization. It features a Python FastAPI backend managing Chronos and LightGBM models, a Next.js 14 frontend for real-time analysis, a traceable experiment pipeline, detailed performance metrics, and live monitoring - built for both research and production environments.

liic.name: LIIC
liic.description: Chrome extension for generating AI-powered LinkedIn comments.

teslaApp.name: Is Tesla Worth It?
teslaApp.description: A calculator to compare the total cost of ownership between two vehicles.

emmausConnect.name: Emmaüs Connect
emmausConnect.description: Platform for managing and refurbishing donated smartphones.

wilderGame.name: Wilder Game
wilderGame.description: A web-based quiz game about movie release dates.

timeline.title: Journey
timeline.intro: Explore my professional journey and discover my experience.

experiences.description: Making law accessible to everyone through the platform allaw.fr
I offer my freelance services as a fullstack JavaScript developer.
Focused on elevating the front-end experience for legalconstat.fr using a tech stack that included ReactJS, Symfony, and SCSS.
Managed five web/mobile apps using Scrum, focusing on UX/UI design and API architecture
Guided a tech team, resolving issues with developers, using HTML5/CSS for data analysis and solution development.
Managed multi-site server environments, working closely with web developers to ensure optimized storage and security features.
Focused on end-to-end web solutions using PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for a municipal website project.

faq.title: Do you have any questions?
faq.intro: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions.

items.question: What inspired you to work in web development?
items.answer: Discovering computers early made me love creating and experimenting. The web showed me a space where creativity and technical problem-solving meet, and that blend is what inspired me to pursue it as a career.

items.question: What do you look for in a professional environment to do your best work?
items.answer: I perform at my best when there’s trust, real autonomy, a clear product vision, and a healthy work environment where everyone can move forward with focus.

items.question: What type of organization allows you to be most effective in your daily work?
items.answer: Asynchronous operations with well-planned checkpoints. I'm at my best when I can organize my focus blocks, document properly, and move forward without constant interruptions.

items.question: What makes my profile an asset for a company?
items.answer: I’m autonomous across the entire workflow: concept, design, specs, code, tests, and delivery. I bring a pragmatic product mindset, integrate quickly, take initiative, and enjoy both building and refining a project.

items.question: What role do AI tools play in how you work today?
items.answer: They’re central to my workflow. I regularly test new models to save time, explore ideas, and maximize efficiency in a field that evolves extremely fast.

metadata.title: Vincent's portfolio
